title: Shopping list item edit flow is broken — cannot click items to edit
description:
Regression: clicking on a shopping list item no longer opens an edit view. This affects all edit functionality including store tagging, item modifications, etc. The edit flow is broken everywhere — not just on the dashboard, but on the full shopping page as well.

Root cause investigation needed. Customer identified two commits that may be involved:
1. b663d0a — Replaced approval workflow (4 buttons: approve, deny, compare, delete) with simple 'Added by' tracking (2 buttons: compare, delete). This was intentional simplification but should not have affected the edit entry point.
2. A separate commit that made a default shopping list show on the dashboard — may have changed how item components render.

The edit flow itself likely still exists — the entry point (click handler on item row) was lost or overridden during one of these changes.

Acceptance criteria:
- Clicking a shopping list item opens the edit view
- All item edit functionality restored (store tagging, item details, etc.)
- Edit works on both the shopping page and any embedded views
- No regression to the 'Added by' tracking or compare/delete buttons

Dev Lead.notes: Sarah Kim approved. See review for details.
